§6Welded Technetium/Cadmium Steel Plate§f is the processed structural form.

§eTask:§f Craft 1x §bWelded Plate§f (plate_welded) from Tc/Cd Steel

§c§4ENERGY WARNING:§f
Each plate costs approximately §c1.2 Billion HE§f to produce!

§eRequirements:§f
• Tc/Cd Steel ingots
• Welding machine/process
• §bMassive power infrastructure§f

§eUses:§f
• Watz Powerplant construction
• Fusion Reactor components
• End-game structural elements

§aTip:§f Verify your power generation can sustain 1.2+ billion HE before attempting.
